summary.ownershipModel: cross-functional operating model defined for Growth, Product, Engineering, Support and Analytics
summary.executionRituals: operating cadence defined for daily/weekly/biweekly/monthly decisions
summary.decisionLog: single decision log template adopted for auditable growth governance

ownership.responsibility: conversion and retention strategy, KPI accountability
technical feasibility, rollout safety, instrumentation integrity
ticket intelligence, user friction signals, SLA risk
event quality, experiment measurement, decision confidence

rituals.name: daily-growth-triage
rituals.output: top incidents and blockers with owner + ETA

rituals.name: weekly-growth-review
rituals.output: KPI review, funnel deltas and action list

rituals.name: monthly-executive-check
rituals.output: strategic alignment, risk review and resource rebalancing

decisionLogTemplate.rule: no growth decision closes without evidence and owner
